# Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related [Jira](https://foodsconnected.atlassian.net/) ticket reference

## Checklist
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] The commit messages follow our guidelines
- [ ] There is a single Jira ticket covering the changes in this PR
- [ ] The Jira ticket covers only these changes and is closed on PR completion
- [ ] Remove the branch when the PR is merged

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update
